task_completion.description: Log in to the system as admin/admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Odoo login screen with 'admin' entered, followed by the successful loading of the Odoo dashboard or Inventory module.

task_completion.description: Create a sub-location named 'Zone A - Power Tools' under the parent location 'WH/Stock'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location creation form or list view in Odoo showing the Location Name as 'Zone A - Power Tools' and the Parent Location set to 'WH/Stock'.

task_completion.description: Create a sub-location named 'Zone B - Hand Tools' under the parent location 'WH/Stock'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location creation form or list view in Odoo showing the Location Name as 'Zone B - Hand Tools' and the Parent Location set to 'WH/Stock'.

task_completion.description: Create a sub-location named 'Zone C - Fasteners' under the parent location 'WH/Stock'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location creation form or list view in Odoo showing the Location Name as 'Zone C - Fasteners' and the Parent Location set to 'WH/Stock'.

task_completion.description: Configure a putaway rule to route the 'Power Tools' category to 'Zone A - Power Tools'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Putaway Rules interface showing a rule where 'When products arrive in' is 'WH/Stock', 'Product Category' is 'Power Tools', and 'Store to' is 'WH/Stock/Zone A - Power Tools' (or 'Zone A - Power Tools').

task_completion.description: Configure a putaway rule to route the 'Hand Tools' category to 'Zone B - Hand Tools'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Putaway Rules interface showing a rule where 'When products arrive in' is 'WH/Stock', 'Product Category' is 'Hand Tools', and 'Store to' is 'WH/Stock/Zone B - Hand Tools' (or 'Zone B - Hand Tools').

task_completion.description: Configure a putaway rule to route the 'Fasteners' category to 'Zone C - Fasteners'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Putaway Rules interface showing a rule where 'When products arrive in' is 'WH/Stock', 'Product Category' is 'Fasteners', and 'Store to' is 'WH/Stock/Zone C - Fasteners' (or 'Zone C - Fasteners').

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to create the locations and rules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, form filling, and navigation through the Odoo Inventory module menus rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The records were genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show Odoo's standard save confirmations, breadcrumbs, and list views updating with the new locations and rules, not just text pasted into a document.

integrity.description: The interface shows authentic Odoo rendering without signs of HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fonts, alignments, and UI elements match standard Odoo behavior consistently across multiple screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected short names for the locations are exactly 'Zone A - Power Tools', 'Zone B - Hand Tools', and 'Zone C - Fasteners'. Note: Odoo automatically prepends the parent location path to the display name. Therefore, when viewing the Putaway Rules, the destination locations will correctly appear as 'WH/Stock/Zone A - Power Tools', 'WH/Stock/Zone B - Hand Tools', and 'WH/Stock/Zone C - Fasteners'. Do not penalize the agent if the UI displays these full paths; this is the correct behavior for setting WH/Stock as the parent location.
